title: Esp Vocab
subtitle: 西语词汇 · CEFR A1 → C2 · 100词为一组
description: Spanish vocabulary organised by CEFR level (A1–C2), grouped 100 words at a time, with English translation, IPA, example sentence, and Edge TTS for every layer.

levels.title: A1 · Principiante
levels.subtitle: Survival vocab — greetings, family, basic verbs, everyday objects.

levels.title: A2 · Elemental
levels.subtitle: Daily life, weekend plans, simple opinions, body and health.

levels.title: B1 · Intermedio
levels.subtitle: Work, travel, feelings, more nuanced verbs, common phrases.

levels.title: B2 · Intermedio alto
levels.subtitle: Abstract ideas, opinions, discussions, idiomatic phrases.

levels.title: C1 · Avanzado
levels.subtitle: Academic vocabulary, advanced verbs, professional language.

levels.title: C2 · Maestría
levels.subtitle: Nuance, register, literary and specialised vocabulary.
